title: Lots of Heavy Cores
description: This mod increases the overall chances of getting multiple heavy cores from a single ominous vault.
body:
# Heavy Core Automation
## Guaranteed Heavy Core drops from every Ominous Vault in Trial Chambers.

- Lots of Heavy Cores is a lightweight Fabric mod designed for players who want a more consistent and rewarding experience inside Minecraft’s Trial Chambers. In vanilla gameplay, Heavy Cores are extremely rare and tied to multiple layers of RNG across several different ominous reward tables. This mod removes that randomness entirely by ensuring that every Ominous Vault you open will always drop a Heavy Core, no matter which variant of the vault or reward table the structure uses.

- _Minecraft 1.21.11 introduced a complex set of loot tables for Trial Chambers. This mod automatically detects all of those ominous reward tables and injects a guaranteed Heavy Core into each one. The result is a predictable progression path for players who want to avoid the frustration of running dozens of chambers without seeing a single core._

### This mod (is):
- (Currently) only works offline
- Compatible with vanilla clients
- Lightweight & safe

**Heavy Core Automation ensures that every ominous vault feels rewarding and worth the effort.**
